articles.title: ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ struts to first place with $77 million debut
articles.description:

articles.title: Agent hit by buckshot from the gun of man charged in correspondents’ dinner attack, prosecutor says
articles.description:
Jeanine Pirro, the US attorney for the District of Columbia, said last week there was no evidence the agent was hit by friendly fire during the incident at a Washington hotel on April 25.
